title: PokéGals [Cobblemon]
description: a data pack that add alternate costume for some Pokémon that turn them into girls!
body:
"Let's get this place HUMID!!"

Inspire by Pokepia where in the japanese version bulbasaur speaking using gyaru slang which inspire many fan design of Gyaru Bulbasur on x. So here's my on turing some cobblemon into some anime girls!

![Bulbasaur gals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba25f26944ecce1a6861a9490c1c96a19f88fa36.png)

Featuring

Gyaru Bulbasaur - Let's get this place HUMID!! (Coming soon!)
Gyaru Slowpoke - is the renovation finish yet? i can't wait to get back to sleep
Much more in the future! 

Turn these mons into their gals form by interacting with their cosmetic slot with "pink wool"

Wanna join in the project and suggest some idea? join in the suggestion thread here! --> https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1484839000186294403
